Created two new shortcodes:

- `themes/jorap/layouts/shortcodes/spotify_iframe_artist.html`
- `themes/jorap/layouts/shortcodes/spotify_iframe_track.html`

**Usage**

```md
{{</* spotify_iframe_artist 12t16fNXKGzNRO5p81Xvyo */>}}

{{</* spotify_iframe_track 5ikuIeKWiuCKMxvu5gloyl */>}}
```

Both also accept named params if you want to override the default height of `352`:

```md
{{</* spotify_iframe_track id="5ikuIeKWiuCKMxvu5gloyl" height="80" */>}}
```

Each renders the exact iframe markup you specified (with `border-radius:12px`, `utm_source=generator`, `loading="lazy"`, and the full `allow` permissions list), just swapping in the ID you pass.
